black_market.name: Singularity Fist
black_market.flavor: A knuckle-mounted graviton emitter. Prototype. Not FDA approved. Not anyone-approved.

black_market.name: Oracle Retinas
black_market.flavor: Sees three seconds into the local net's future. Migraines are the price of prophecy.

black_market.name: Monolith Spine
black_market.flavor: Salvaged alien-grade lattice. Nobody knows where Hyphen8d actually got this one.

black_market.name: Ghost Protocol Derm
black_market.flavor: Adaptive camo-weave that reads a room before you walk into it. Illegal in every district that knows it exists.
